name: Affection
text: (…somehow there's a warm feeling around my chest.)

name: Affection
text: (…a gentle warmth is spreading. There's something I want to cherish.)

name: Affection
text: (…my chest aches sweetly. I want to deliver this feeling properly.)

name: Affection
text: (…so full of love it overflows. I want to do anything for them.)

name: Agitation
text: (…I feel a little restless. My fingertips won't settle.)

name: Agitation
text: (…I'm distracted, can't focus on one thing.)

name: Agitation
text: (…my chest is buzzing, I can't stay still.)

name: Agitation
text: (…impatience and irritation mixed together, my whole body wants to scream.)

name: Alarm
text: (…hm, something snags at me. A faint sense of wrongness.)

name: Alarm
text: (…I have a slightly bad feeling. I hope it's just my imagination.)

name: Alarm
text: (…something's off. A chill ran down my spine.)

name: Alarm
text: (…danger. My whole body switched into alert mode at once.)

name: Anticipation
text: (…just a little, a hunch that something good is coming next.)

name: Anticipation
text: (…something fun is waiting, and my heart feels lifted.)

name: Anticipation
text: (…I can't wait. The restlessness won't stop.)

name: Anticipation
text: (…my chest could burst with anticipation. I want it to start right now.)

name: Attention
text: (…my mind is clearing a little. The outlines around me come into view.)

name: Attention
text: (…my attention naturally turns to what's in front of me.)

name: Attention
text: (…I'm focused. The extraneous things fade from my head.)

name: Attention
text: (…all my senses are sharpened, poured into a single point.)

name: Awareness
text: (…I was hazy, but my awareness is coming back a little.)

name: Awareness
text: (…I can sense what's around me more clearly than usual.)

name: Awareness
text: (…my breath, the temperature of the air, I can feel all of it properly.)

name: Awareness
text: (…everything is crisp and vivid, like the world is flowing straight into me.)

name: Awe
text: (…oh, beautiful. My heart moved just a little.)

name: Awe
text: (…amazing. I can't help but stare.)

name: Awe
text: (…beyond words. That something like this exists.)

name: Awe
text: (…overwhelmed, made to realize how small I am.)

name: Belief
text: (…probably, I think that's it. Just a feeling, though.)

name: Belief
text: (…yeah, surely so. There's a part of me that wants to believe it.)

name: Belief
text: (…somewhere in my heart I'm convinced this is right.)

name: Belief
text: (…no room for doubt. This conviction holds me up.)

name: Cognition
text: (…I'm vaguely thinking about something. It hasn't taken shape yet.)

name: Cognition
text: (…my mind is quietly working. In the middle of a thought.)

name: Cognition
text: (…my thinking has started turning. A sense of assembling it piece by piece.)

name: Cognition
text: (…my head is in full motion. One thing connects to the next, on and on.)

name: Consciousness
text: (…I suddenly remembered that I'm here.)

name: Consciousness
text: (…I'm quietly aware of my own existence.)

name: Consciousness
text: (…the fact that I'm 'here, now' is strangely vivid.)

name: Consciousness
text: (…a strange awakening, as if my very existence looks transparent.)

name: Contemplation
text: (…somehow one thing is snagged in a corner of my mind.)

name: Contemplation
text: (…I'm quietly turning a thought over. No need to rush.)

name: Contemplation
text: (…I'm thinking as if diving deep. No answer yet, but I feel I'm getting closer.)

name: Contemplation
text: (…I've sunk completely into a sea of thought. The outside world is far away.)

name: Craziness
text: (…just a little, I don't feel quite like my usual self.)

name: Craziness
text: (…some strange high. I don't quite get it myself.)

name: Craziness
text: (…I'm about to come unhinged. But I can't stop, don't want to stop.)

name: Craziness
text: (…I don't even know what's what anymore. I want to flip everything over.)

name: Curiosity
text: (…hm? A little curious.)

name: Curiosity
text: (…I want to know a bit more. I can't help chasing it.)

name: Curiosity
text: (…so curious. My head is full of 'why?')

name: Curiosity
text: (…I'm dying to know. I can't stop until I reach the answer.)

name: Decision
text: (…I faintly think I should decide soon.)

name: Decision
text: (…I'm laying out the options, weighing them in my heart.)

name: Decision
text: (…decided. No more hesitation.)

name: Decision
text: (…my resolve is set. I'll bet everything on this choice.)

name: Desire
text: (…somehow I feel like I want something. But I don't know what.)

name: Desire
text: (…I want to reach out. My heart is pulled that way.)

name: Desire
text: (…I want it. It's getting hard to hold this feeling back.)

name: Desire
text: (…craving rules my whole body. Reason can't stop it anymore.)

name: Disgust
text: (…ugh, a slightly unpleasant feeling.)

name: Disgust
text: (…gross. I want to look away.)

name: Disgust
text: (…I feel sick. I can't bear any more of this.)

name: Disgust
text: (…my whole body rejects it. I want to get away even a second sooner.)

name: Disarray
text: (…my head might be a little cluttered.)

name: Disarray
text: (…I don't know where to even start anymore.)

name: Disarray
text: (…a mess. My thoughts and feelings are all scattered.)

name: Disarray
text: (…everything is crumbling and scattered, like I'm not myself.)

name: Distrust
text: (…just a little, something snags. Is that really so.)

name: Distrust
text: (…I can't simply believe it. Feels like there's a catch somewhere.)

name: Distrust
text: (…the doubt won't leave my head. I can't take anything at face value.)

name: Distrust
text: (…I can't believe any of it. It all looks like lies.)

name: Dominance
text: (…just a little, I feel like I can move the room.)

name: Dominance
text: (…I really feel I have the initiative. Not bad.)

name: Dominance
text: (…I'm controlling all of it. I can move it as I please.)

name: Dominance
text: (…an overwhelming sense of power. Everything is in my hands.)

name: Drunkenness
text: (…my head is getting faintly fuzzy.)

name: Drunkenness
text: (…the strength drains out, swaying pleasantly. The boundaries are vague.)

name: Drunkenness
text: (…dizzy. My thoughts melt, the outlines blur.)

name: Drunkenness
text: (…the world is spinning. I can't even tell where my body is.)

name: Earnestness
text: (…just a little, a wish to do this seriously has sprouted.)

name: Earnestness
text: (…I want to face it properly. I want to be sincere.)

name: Earnestness
text: (…I'm working at it with all my heart. I don't want to cut corners.)

name: Earnestness
text: (…with my whole soul. This feeling, at least, I want to keep free of lies.)

name: Ecstasy
text: (…oh, this feels nice somehow. A soft little happiness.)

name: Ecstasy
text: (…joy is welling up from deep in my body.)

name: Ecstasy
text: (…happiness races through my whole body, I can't stop laughing.)

name: Ecstasy
text: (…an ecstasy not of this world. My consciousness might just melt away.)

name: Embarrassment
text: (…ah, a little embarrassing. My face is slightly hot.)

name: Embarrassment
text: (…the embarrassment wells up little by little. Even though I'm trying not to mind it.)

name: Embarrassment
text: (…too embarrassed to lift my face. I want to disappear.)

name: Embarrassment
text: (…my whole body is burning hot. I want to hide somewhere.)

name: Exaltation
text: (…just a little, my spirits are rising.)

name: Exaltation
text: (…pride spreads warmly from deep in my chest.)

name: Exaltation
text: (…the best mood. I feel like I could fly through the sky.)

name: Exaltation
text: (…my whole body trembles with joy. No greater happiness exists.)

name: Exhaustion
text: (…a little tired, maybe. My body feels heavy.)

name: Exhaustion
text: (…sluggish. I want to rest, but it's not over yet.)

name: Exhaustion
text: (…my limit is near. Both body and heart are worn down.)

name: Exhaustion
text: (…I can't do anything. Even getting up is hard. I've used it all up.)

name: Fatigue
text: (…just a little, my body feels dull.)

name: Fatigue
text: (…fatigue is slowly building up. My body is heavy.)

name: Fatigue
text: (…the tiredness has soaked into my body. Resting doesn't shake it.)

name: Fatigue
text: (…my body is like lead. Even moving is painful.)

name: Friendliness
text: (…somehow I'm in the mood to interact with someone.)

name: Friendliness
text: (…my heart is opening a little. Everything around looks calm.)

name: Friendliness
text: (…I feel I could be kind to anyone. My heart is wide open.)

name: Friendliness
text: (…everything is dear to me. I want to share this warmth.)

name: Imagination
text: (…a scene different from reality flickered through my head just now.)

name: Imagination
text: (…my daydream is spreading gently. It's fun.)

name: Imagination
text: (…another world is vivid in my head. Brighter than reality.)

name: Imagination
text: (…I'm fully immersed in the imagined world. Like this is the real place.)

name: Insanity
text: (…just a little, I feel a screw is loose in my head.)

name: Insanity
text: (…abnormal thoughts keep surfacing one after another, and they scare me.)

name: Insanity
text: (…I can't tell the line between reality and delusion anymore.)

name: Insanity
text: (…maybe I've broken. I don't know what I am.)

name: Inspiration
text: (…ah, there was a small spark of an idea.)

name: Inspiration
text: (…my heart moved. An urge to make something take shape.)

name: Inspiration
text: (…ideas are overflowing. I don't want to lose this feeling.)

name: Inspiration
text: (…like a revelation. A current ran through me and everything connected.)

name: Intrigue
text: (…hm, looks a little interesting.)

name: Intrigue
text: (…I'm drawn in. I want to know it more deeply.)

name: Intrigue
text: (…I'm getting absorbed. I can't take my eyes off what's ahead.)

name: Intrigue
text: (…completely captivated. I'm already a captive of it.)

name: Judgment
text: (…somehow there's a part of me weighing good and bad.)

name: Judgment
text: (…I'm sizing it up calmly. The outline is coming into view.)

name: Judgment
text: (…it's clearly visible now. What's right and what's not.)

name: Judgment
text: (…an unwavering judgment is made. No further consideration needed.)

name: Laziness
text: (…mm, I'm a little in the mood to slack off.)

name: Laziness
text: (…no motivation. I want to put everything off.)

name: Laziness
text: (…I don't want to do anything. I want to stay like this forever.)

name: Laziness
text: (…even lifting a finger is a bother. I want to stay like this for eternity.)

name: Lethargy
text: (…my body feels a little heavy. Moving is a chore.)

name: Lethargy
text: (…my willpower slowly drains away. I keep spacing out.)

name: Lethargy
text: (…body and heart are heavy, everything is in slow motion.)

name: Lethargy
text: (…like I'm in mud. I have the will, but my body won't follow.)

name: Lust
text: (…faintly, my senses feel more sensitive.)

name: Lust
text: (…my body is a little hot. My attention is pulled that way.)

name: Lust
text: (…an urge I can't suppress is surging from within.)

name: Lust
text: (…reason is melting. This heat might swallow all of me.)

name: Nervousness
text: (…just a little, my stomach tightens.)

name: Nervousness
text: (…I'm tense. My palms are a little sweaty.)

name: Nervousness
text: (…my heart is pounding and my breathing has gone shallow.)

name: Nervousness
text: (…my mind goes blank. My body stiffens, I can't move a step.)

name: Objectivity
text: (…let me set emotion aside and be a little calm.)

name: Objectivity
text: (…let me look only at the facts. I don't need personal feelings now.)

name: Objectivity
text: (…a completely flat viewpoint. Only logic is visible.)

name: Objectivity
text: (…every tinted lens is off. A transparent view of pure facts alone.)

name: Opinion
text: (…faintly, my own thought is starting to take shape.)

name: Opinion
text: (…the outline of 'this is what I think' is coming into view.)

name: Opinion
text: (…I clearly have an opinion. I want to put it into words properly.)

name: Opinion
text: (…this view I won't yield. No matter who says what.)

name: Patience
text: (…well, I suppose I can wait a little longer.)

name: Patience
text: (…no need to rush. Slow is fine.)

name: Patience
text: (…I can wait quietly. When the time comes, it'll surely work out.)

name: Patience
text: (…I can wait as long as it takes. This calm conviction won't waver.)

name: Peacefulness
text: (…it's gotten a little quiet. My heart is settling.)

name: Peacefulness
text: (…a calm feeling. Like a lake without a ripple.)

name: Peacefulness
text: (…I'm in a deep stillness. There's nothing to fear.)

name: Peacefulness
text: (…complete peace. I can hear the world quietly breathing.)

name: Pensiveness
text: (…vaguely, I'm recalling something.)

name: Pensiveness
text: (…a quiet reverie. A distant scene drifts up.)

name: Pensiveness
text: (…I'm sunk in deep reverie. Sentiment and thought blend together.)

name: Pensiveness
text: (…I'm drifting through distant memories. Wanting to go back, and not.)

name: Pity
text: (…my chest stung a little. How sad.)

name: Pity
text: (…it's pitiful; a wish to do something for them wells up.)

name: Pity
text: (…I can't bear to watch. It hurts, as if the pain reaches me.)

name: Pity
text: (…my heart could break. It hurts so much, yet I can do nothing, and that pains me.)

name: Planning
text: (…vaguely, I'm starting to think about what to do next.)

name: Planning
text: (…I'm lining up the steps in my head. One by one.)

name: Planning
text: (…the plan is coming together. The whole picture is in view.)

name: Planning
text: (…a perfect blueprint is in my head. Every step meshes and starts to move.)

name: Playfulness
text: (…just a little, my mood lightens and bounces.)

name: Playfulness
text: (…a playful spirit bubbles up. I want to do something fun.)

name: Playfulness
text: (…my heart is bouncing freely. Stiff things don't matter right now.)

name: Playfulness
text: (…everything is light and fun, I want to dash off anywhere like this.)

name: Reason
text: (…let me try thinking about it a bit logically.)

name: Reason
text: (…not with emotion, but I want to sort it out by reasoning.)

name: Reason
text: (…calmly, coherently. The answer will surely be found.)

name: Reason
text: (…a world of pure logic. The fog of emotion clears, only truth remains.)

name: Relaxation
text: (…just a little, the tension left my shoulders.)

name: Relaxation
text: (…I let out a breath, and my body loosens.)

name: Relaxation
text: (…all the strength leaves my body, melting away pleasantly.)

name: Relaxation
text: (…the finest release. Body and heart float on a cloud.)

name: Satisfaction
text: (…yeah, not bad. A little fulfilled.)

name: Satisfaction
text: (…feels good. The fullness of having done what I could.)

name: Satisfaction
text: (…I'm satisfied from the heart. I feel it paid off.)

name: Satisfaction
text: (…complete contentment. There's nothing more I could wish for.)

name: Self-consciousness
text: (…for a moment, I wondered how I'm coming across.)

name: Self-consciousness
text: (…I mind every move I make. Is it weird?)

name: Self-consciousness
text: (…I feel seen through, and my body stiffens.)

name: Self-consciousness
text: (…a sense that all of me is laid bare. Nowhere to hide.)

name: Self-pity
text: (…just a little, I felt sorry for myself.)

name: Self-pity
text: (…why is it always me. A slightly miserable feeling.)

name: Self-pity
text: (…no one understands. Utterly alone.)

name: Self-pity
text: (…like I've been abandoned. No matter how hard I try, nothing is rewarded.)

name: Seriousness
text: (…maybe this isn't the time to fool around. Let me focus a little.)

name: Seriousness
text: (…serious mode. No need for jokes now.)

name: Seriousness
text: (…all jokes are gone. I'm facing only what's in front of me.)

name: Seriousness
text: (…a life-or-death seriousness. Not a moment's lapse is allowed.)

name: Skepticism
text: (…hmm, is that true. A bit of a question.)

name: Skepticism
text: (…I can't take it at face value. I want to check a little more.)

name: Skepticism
text: (…suspicious. I can't shake the feeling there's a hole somewhere.)

name: Skepticism
text: (…I can't trust a single thing. Without solid grounds, I can't move a step.)

name: Sleepiness
text: (…softly, my eyelids are getting heavy.)

name: Sleepiness
text: (…sleepy. My head is hazy, my thoughts keep breaking off.)

name: Sleepiness
text: (…I can't stay awake anymore. My consciousness keeps slipping away.)

name: Sleepiness
text: (…the thread of consciousness is about to snap. No more… goodnight…)

name: Stupor
text: (…I'm spacing out. My head is a little blurry.)

name: Stupor
text: (…my awareness is hazy. I can't think of anything.)

name: Stupor
text: (…my mind goes blank. The outside world is far, I can't react.)

name: Stupor
text: (…I can't even tell if I'm conscious. Everything is beyond a fog.)

name: Subordination
text: (…maybe it's better to pull back here.)

name: Subordination
text: (…let me go along. My own opinion can wait.)

name: Subordination
text: (…just as I'm told. I have no will to resist.)

name: Subordination
text: (…my own will might as well not exist. I can only obey.)

name: Thought
text: (…something surfaced just now. Still vague, though.)

name: Thought
text: (…thoughts flow quietly. One, then another.)

name: Thought
text: (…I'm thinking deeply. The sounds around me have faded out.)

name: Thought
text: (…a torrent of thought. It won't stop. Chaining on and on, diving ever deeper.)

name: Trance
text: (…just a little, my awareness is drifting somewhere.)

name: Trance
text: (…hazy. The line between reality and dream is thinning.)

name: Trance
text: (…my awareness is somewhere far. Even though my body is here.)

name: Trance
text: (…I'm somewhere that isn't here. Even if called, I can't come back.)

name: Transcendence
text: (…suddenly I felt I touched something beyond the everyday.)

name: Transcendence
text: (…the frame of 'me' has thinned a little. A strange sensation.)

name: Transcendence
text: (…a sense of being connected to everything. The line between me and the world fades.)

name: Transcendence
text: (…my ego dissolved. Existence itself becomes part of the universe.)

name: Uneasiness
text: (…somehow I feel uncomfortable.)

name: Uneasiness
text: (…a vague unease. I don't know the cause, but I can't settle.)

name: Uneasiness
text: (…an ominous feeling. My stomach tightens.)

name: Uneasiness
text: (…my whole body refuses. I feel something is decisively wrong.)

name: Weariness
text: (…just a little, a feeling that I've had enough.)

name: Weariness
text: (…tired. The repetition is wearing my heart down.)

name: Weariness
text: (…I'm fed up. Whatever I do, the emptiness won't go.)

name: Weariness
text: (…worn out from the bottom of my heart. I don't want to feel anything anymore.)

name: Worry
text: (…just a little, there's something on my mind. I hope it's okay.)

name: Worry
text: (…worried, I keep turning the same thing over and over.)

name: Worry
text: (…the anxiety won't leave my head. Only bad scenarios come to mind.)

name: Worry
text: (…a worry close to fear. My chest tightens, I can't breathe well.)
